role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate, correctly identifying the temperate maritime environment.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Correctly identified specific flora (bracken) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road width, surface quality, and fencing styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used image quality and cross-domain knowledge to support the UK/Ireland hypothesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United Kingdom. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing consistent evidence (bracken, fencing, road width) that pointed to the British Isles. The final decision was robust.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted the lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of green hills, deciduous trees, and overcast sky match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of bracken ferns on the roadside is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observations of the narrow road and wooden fence are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Assessment of image quality and rural infrastructure style is consistent with the visual data.
